title: gossia retusa
intro: Gossia retusa, also known as the Kauri pine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gossia retusa include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Gossia retusa typically involve the leaves and branches being dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
